semantic.role: API Handler serving as the HTTP entry point for user creation operations.
responsibilities: Receives incoming HTTP requests for user creation.
Delegates user creation logic to the UserService domain service.
Directly manages Database connection lifecycle (violating layered architecture).
outOfScope: Business logic for user validation or creation (handled by UserService).
Persistence implementation details (handled by Database infrastructure).
invariants: Must import UserService from domain layer.
Exports a class CreateUserHandler as the public API.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Serve as the HTTP entry point for user creation, delegating to domain services.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected in this file from provided context.
